description: Enumerated dedicated vector-only fixtures — controlled windows/pages that source conformance vectors but are NOT manifest corpus sessions: they have no truth.docent.json, no corpus baseline key, and no sufficiency-baseline entry. Their element_facts and locators are producer-emitted (real capture over the fixture), and their vectors are self-describing (lock (2) checks internal consistency, not a session truth). A vector under corpus/sessions/<id>/vectors/ whose <id> is not a manifest session must be listed here (hygiene lock (1)).

fixtures.notes: A controlled top-level window (a dedicated custom window class) hosting a STATIC label (authored automation_id) preceding an EDIT (authored automation_id, distinct class); the label supplies the EDIT's UIA Name, so automation_id / role_name / class_name / tree_path are exercisable over a real UIA capture. The window's procedure answers the UIA object request with a fragment-root provider whose IRawElementProviderHwndOverride merges a real UIA LabeledBy relation onto the native EDIT (control type stays Edit), so labeled_by is exercisable too — all five desktop strategies are covered.
